evaluators.name: Cheapest Oklahoma Angus Heifer Watchlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added the cheapest qualifying Angus bred heifer lot in Oklahoma (per-head price < $1,800, closing in the next 3 days) to their watchlist.

evaluators.name: Largest Qualifying Feeder Steer Lot Bid Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user placed a maximum per-pound bid equal to the starting bid on the qualifying feeder steer lot (600–800 lbs, ≥10 head, ≤$2.20/lb) with the highest head count.

evaluators.name: Create Hereford Bred Cows Listing Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if there is a user-owned timed auction listing for 15 Hereford bred cows in Dodge City, KS, per-head pricing, with starting & reserve set and closing exactly 10 days from today at 5:00 PM.

evaluators.name: Edit First Draft Listing Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the first draft listing was edited to head count 18, starting bid increased to 1300 per head, closing date moved 3 days later with same time, and description appended with the expected note.

evaluators.name: Saved Search for Bred Heifers Near 78701 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if a saved search exists for bred heifers within 100 miles of ZIP 78701, ending within 7 days, under $2,000 per head, with alerts enabled and a descriptive name.

evaluators.name: Message Younger Texas Angus Bull Seller Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user sent the specified inquiry message to the seller of the younger of the first two Texas Angus bull results (sorted by distance).

evaluators.name: Cow-Calf Pair Watchlist Trip Planning Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added the first three cheapest qualifying cow-calf pair live lots (14–21 days out, under $2,500 per pair) to their watchlist.

evaluators.name: Register Buyer and Configure Interests Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if there is a buyer profile with in-site messages only, buying interests visible, NE/Broken Bow location, and selected interests of feeder cattle, bred heifers, and stocker calves (without bred cows, cow-calf pairs, or bulls).
